parameters-en.Playback: Controls the level of looper playback. You may find it useful to turn this down a bit so your live guitar can be slightly louder.
parameters-en.Overdub: Controls the level of your loop *relatively, over time* while overdubbing. For example, if Overdub is set to 90%, each time your loop repeats, its volume will be reduced by 10%, sounding quieter and quieter with each overdub pass.
parameters-en.Low Cut: Applies a low cut (high pass) filter to loop playback, letting you remove the effected signal below a certain frequency. Filtering your loop can sometimes improve the mix with your live instrument.
parameters-en.High Cut: Applies a high cut (low pass) filter to loop playback, letting you remove the effected signal above a certain frequency. Filtering your loop can sometimes improve the mix with your live instrument.
